'''竏嗾-zh-p''' ('''katazhap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zee|zee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zee|zee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| katazhap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhap|thitazhap]] || [[word:jitazhap|jitazhap]] || [[word:shitazhap|shitazhap]] || [[word:kitazhap|kitazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhap|thuthutazhap]] || [[word:jujutazhap|jujutazhap]] || [[word:shushutazhap|shushutazhap]] || [[word:kukutazhap|kukutazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhap|thutazhap]] || [[word:jutazhap|jutazhap]] || [[word:shutazhap|shutazhap]] || [[word:kutazhap|kutazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhap|thutazhap]] || [[word:jutazhap|jutazhap]] || [[word:shutazhap|shutazhap]] || [[word:kutazhap|kutazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhap|thetazhap]] || [[word:jetazhap|jetazhap]] || [[word:shetazhap|shetazhap]] || [[word:ketazhap|ketazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhap|thothotazhap]] || [[word:jojotazhap|jojotazhap]] || [[word:shoshotazhap|shoshotazhap]] || [[word:kokotazhap|kokotazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhap|thotazhap]] || [[word:jotazhap|jotazhap]] || [[word:shotazhap|shotazhap]] || [[word:kotazhap|kotazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhap|thotazhap]] || [[word:jotazhap|jotazhap]] || [[word:shotazhap|shotazhap]] || [[word:kotazhap|kotazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]] || [[word:tazhap|tazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtazhap|thﾃｦtazhap]] || [[word:jﾃｦtazhap|jﾃｦtazhap]] || [[word:shﾃｦtazhap|shﾃｦtazhap]] || [[word:kﾃｦtazhap|kﾃｦtazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhap|thathatazhap]] || [[word:jajatazhap|jajatazhap]] || [[word:shashatazhap|shashatazhap]] || [[word:kakatazhap|kakatazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhap|thatazhap]] || [[word:jatazhap|jatazhap]] || [[word:shatazhap|shatazhap]] || [[word:katazhap|katazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhap|thatazhap]] || [[word:jatazhap|jatazhap]] || [[word:shatazhap|shatazhap]] || [[word:katazhap|katazhap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatazhap|shatazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatazhap|goshatazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatazhap|gokishatazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatazhapnﾃｼ|shatazhapnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhapnknﾃｼ|goshatazhapnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhapnﾃｼ|gokishatazhapnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatazhapshﾃｫ|shatazhapshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkshﾃｫ|goshatazhapnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatazhapshﾃｫ|gokishatazhapshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhapro|shatazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkro|goshatazhapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhapro|gokishatazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhapmu|shatazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkmu|goshatazhapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhapmu|gokishatazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatazhapsher|shatazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatazhapnksher|goshatazhapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatazhapsher|gokishatazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatazhapng|shatazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkng|goshatazhapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatazhapng|gokishatazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatazhapya|shatazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkya|goshatazhapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatazhapya|gokishatazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatazhapyam|shatazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkyam|goshatazhapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatazhapyam|gokishatazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhapnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shatazhapnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhapnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshatazhapnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhapnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishatazhapnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhapnﾃｼro|shatazhapnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhapnknﾃｼro|goshatazhapnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhapnﾃｼro|gokishatazhapnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhapnﾃｼmu|shatazhapnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhapnknﾃｼmu|goshatazhapnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhapnﾃｼmu|gokishatazhapnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhapshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shatazhapshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshatazhapnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhapshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishatazhapshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhapshﾃｫro|shatazhapshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkshﾃｫro|goshatazhapnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhapshﾃｫro|gokishatazhapshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhapshﾃｫmu|shatazhapshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkshﾃｫmu|goshatazhapnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhapshﾃｫmu|gokishatazhapshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhapronﾃｼ|shatazhapronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkronﾃｼ|goshatazhapnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhapronﾃｼ|gokishatazhapronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhaproshﾃｫ|shatazhaproshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkroshﾃｫ|goshatazhapnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhaproshﾃｫ|gokishatazhaproshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhapromu|shatazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkromu|goshatazhapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhapromu|gokishatazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhapmunﾃｼ|shatazhapmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkmunﾃｼ|goshatazhapnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhapmunﾃｼ|gokishatazhapmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhapmushﾃｫ|shatazhapmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkmushﾃｫ|goshatazhapnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhapmushﾃｫ|gokishatazhapmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhapmuro|shatazhapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhapnkmuro|goshatazhapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhapmuro|gokishatazhapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
